title: CONTRIBUTING
text: Submit issue Issues page

title: CONTRIBUTING
text: Fork repo Github account Clone version account machine account, e.g,. git clone https://github.com/<yourgithubusername>/rredlist.git Make sure track progress upstream (.e., version rredlist ropensci/rredlist) git remote add upstream https://github.com/ropensci/rredlist.git. making changes make sure pull changes upstream either git fetch upstream merge later git pull upstream fetch merge one step Make changes (bonus points making changes new feature branch) Run tests! Push account Submit pull request home base ropensci/rredlist

title: rredlist
text: CRAN Development version
code: install.packages("rredlist") remotes::install_github("ropensci/rredlist") # OR install.packages("rredlist", repos="https://dev.ropensci.org")

title: rredlist
text: IUCN requires get API key, alphanumeric string need send every request. ’s helper function package helping getting https://apiv3.iucnredlist.org/api/v3/token storing . Keep key private. can pass key function via key parameter, ’s better store key either environment variable (IUCN_REDLIST_KEY) R option (iucn_redlist_key) - recommend using former option.
code: rredlist::rl_use_iucn()

title: rredlist
text: High level functions HTTP request parse data data.frame ease downstream use. high level functions underscore end function name, e.g., rl_search() Note: can sometimes discrepancy get IUCN website get package; don’t know , IUCN API open book. Likely bit faster parse list , take extra data.frame parsing time even speed, use low level package interface.
code: library("rredlist") rl_search('Fratercula arctica') #> $name #> [1] "Fratercula arctica" #>  #> $result #>    taxonid    scientific_name  kingdom   phylum class           order  family #> 1 22694927 Fratercula arctica ANIMALIA CHORDATA  AVES CHARADRIIFORMES ALCIDAE #>        genus main_common_name        authority published_year assessment_date #> 1 Fratercula  Atlantic Puffin (Linnaeus, 1758)           2018      2018-08-07 #>   category criteria population_trend marine_system freshwater_system #> 1       VU  A4abcde       Decreasing          TRUE             FALSE #>   terrestrial_system               assessor        reviewer aoo_km2  eoo_km2 #> 1               TRUE BirdLife International Westrip, J.R.S.      NA 20800000 #>   elevation_upper elevation_lower depth_upper depth_lower errata_flag #> 1              NA              NA          NA          NA          NA #>   errata_reason amended_flag amended_reason #> 1            NA           NA             NA rl_search('Fratercula arctica', parse = FALSE) #> $name #> [1] "Fratercula arctica" #>  #> $result #> $result[[1]] #> $result[[1]]$taxonid #> [1] 22694927 #>  #> $result[[1]]$scientific_name #> [1] "Fratercula arctica" ...

title: rredlist
text: parsing data.frame high level functions take extra time. low level functions HTTP request, give back JSON without parsing. low level functions underscore end function name, e.g., rl_search_() consume JSON, can use jsonlite tools, e.g., jq via jqr R client
code: rl_search_('Fratercula arctica') #> [1] "{\"name\":\"Fratercula arctica\",\"result\":[{\"taxonid\":22694927,\"scientific_name\":\"Fratercula arctica\",\"kingdom\":\"ANIMALIA\",\"phylum\":\"CHORDATA\",\"class\":\"AVES\",\"order\":\"CHARADRIIFORMES\",\"family\":\"ALCIDAE\",\"genus\":\"Fratercula\",\"main_common_name\":\"Atlantic Puffin\",\"authority\":\"(Linnaeus, 1758)\",\"published_year\":2018,\"assessment_date\":\"2018-08-07\",\"category\":\"VU\",\"criteria\":\"A4abcde\",\"population_trend\":\"Decreasing\",\"marine_system\":true,\"freshwater_system\":false,\"terrestrial_system\":true,\"assessor\":\"BirdLife International\",\"reviewer\":\"Westrip, J.R.S.\",\"aoo_km2\":null,\"eoo_km2\":\"20800000\",\"elevation_upper\":null,\"elevation_lower\":null,\"depth_upper\":null,\"depth_lower\":null,\"errata_flag\":null,\"errata_reason\":null,\"amended_flag\":null,\"amended_reason\":null}]}" library("jsonlite") jsonlite::fromJSON(rl_search_('Fratercula arctica')) #> $name #> [1] "Fratercula arctica" #>  #> $result #>    taxonid    scientific_name  kingdom   phylum class           order  family #> 1 22694927 Fratercula arctica ANIMALIA CHORDATA  AVES CHARADRIIFORMES ALCIDAE #>        genus main_common_name        authority published_year assessment_date #> 1 Fratercula  Atlantic Puffin (Linnaeus, 1758)           2018      2018-08-07 #>   category criteria population_trend marine_system freshwater_system #> 1       VU  A4abcde       Decreasing          TRUE             FALSE #>   terrestrial_system               assessor        reviewer aoo_km2  eoo_km2 #> 1               TRUE BirdLife International Westrip, J.R.S.      NA 20800000 #>   elevation_upper elevation_lower depth_upper depth_lower errata_flag #> 1              NA              NA          NA          NA          NA #>   errata_reason amended_flag amended_reason #> 1            NA           NA             NA # remotes::install_github("ropensci/jqr") library("jqr") rl_search_('Fratercula arctica') %>% dot() #> $data #> [1] "{\"name\":\"Fratercula arctica\",\"result\":[{\"taxonid\":22694927,\"scientific_name\":\"Fratercula arctica\",\"kingdom\":\"ANIMALIA\",\"phylum\":\"CHORDATA\",\"class\":\"AVES\",\"order\":\"CHARADRIIFORMES\",\"family\":\"ALCIDAE\",\"genus\":\"Fratercula\",\"main_common_name\":\"Atlantic Puffin\",\"authority\":\"(Linnaeus, 1758)\",\"published_year\":2018,\"assessment_date\":\"2018-08-07\",\"category\":\"VU\",\"criteria\":\"A4abcde\",\"population_trend\":\"Decreasing\",\"marine_system\":true,\"freshwater_system\":false,\"terrestrial_system\":true,\"assessor\":\"BirdLife International\",\"reviewer\":\"Westrip, J.R.S.\",\"aoo_km2\":null,\"eoo_km2\":\"20800000\",\"elevation_upper\":null,\"elevation_lower\":null,\"depth_upper\":null,\"depth_lower\":null,\"errata_flag\":null,\"errata_reason\":null,\"amended_flag\":null,\"amended_reason\":null}]}" #>  #> $args #> $args[[1]] #> [1] "." #> attr(,"type") #> [1] "dot" #>  #>  #> attr(,"class") #> [1] "jqr"

what: Citing the IUCN Red List API
title: rredlist
text: Use function rl_citation():
code: rl_citation() #> [1] "IUCN 2015. IUCN Red List of Threatened Species. Version 2020-2 <www.iucnredlist.org>"

title: rredlist
text: IUCN folks: “many frequent calls, many calls per day might get access blocked temporarily. ’re heavy API user, Red List Unit asked contact , might better options. suggest 2-second delay calls plan make lot calls.”

title: Authors and Citation
text: William Gearty. Author, maintainer. Scott Chamberlain. Author. . Funder.            https://ropensci.org/ Maëlle Salmon. Contributor.

title: IUCN Red List Client
text: rredlist R client IUCN Red List (https://apiv3.iucnredlist.org/api/v3/docs). IUCN Red List global list threatened endangered species. IUCN Red List docs: https://apiv3.iucnredlist.org/api/v3/docs

title: IUCN Red List Client
text: CRAN Development version
code: install.packages("rredlist") remotes::install_github("ropensci/rredlist") # OR install.packages("rredlist", repos="https://dev.ropensci.org")

title: IUCN Red List Client
text: Please report issues bugs. License: MIT Get citation information rredlist R citation(package = 'rredlist') Please note package released Contributor Code Conduct. contributing project, agree abide terms.

title: Get species — rl_sp
text: Get species

title: Get species — rl_sp
code: rl_sp(page = 0, key = NULL, parse = TRUE, all = FALSE, quiet = FALSE, ...)  rl_sp_(page, key = NULL, all = FALSE, quiet = FALSE, ...)

title: Get species — rl_sp
text: page (integer/numeric) Page get. Default: 0. can get 10,000 records per page. Paging required much burden server just "get data" one request key IUCN API token. See rl_use_iucn. parse (logical) Whether parse list (FALSE) data.frame (TRUE). Default: TRUE (logical) get results . Default: FALSE. means paging internally . result list results, bind together data.frame, see example quiet (logical) give progress download . Default: FALSE (, give progress). ignored = FALSE ... Curl options passed HttpClient

title: Get species — rl_sp
code: if (FALSE) { rl_sp(page = 3)  # get all results out <- rl_sp(all = TRUE) length(out) vapply(out, "[[", 1, "count") all_df <- do.call(rbind, lapply(out, "[[", "result")) head(all_df) NROW(all_df) }

title: Get species by category — rl_sp_category
text: category (character) two-letter category code. One "DD", "LC", "NT", "VU", "EN", "CR", "EW", "EX", "LRlc", "LRnt", "LRcd" key IUCN API token. See rl_use_iucn. parse (logical) Whether parse list (FALSE) data.frame (TRUE). Default: TRUE ... Curl options passed HttpClient

title: Get species by category — rl_sp_category
code: if (FALSE) { rl_sp_category('VU') rl_sp_category('LRlc') rl_sp_category('EN') rl_sp_category('EX') rl_sp_category('EX', parse = FALSE) rl_sp_category_('EX') }

title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: IUCN Red List R Client

title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: documentation (quoting): "advisable wherever possible use taxon name (species name) make API calls, rather using IDs. IDs immovable expected used mainly organizations work closely IUCN Red List."

title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: IUCN requires get API key, alphanumeric string need send every request. See key IUCN API token. See rl_use_iucn() help getting storing . Get https://apiv3.iucnredlist.org/api/v3/token Keep key private. can pass key function via key parameter, better store key either environment variable (IUCN_REDLIST_KEY) R option (iucn_redlist_key) - recommend using former option.

what: High vs. Low level package APIs
title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: High level API High level functions HTTP request parse data data.frame ease downstream use. high level functions underscore end function name, e.g., rl_search() Low level API parsing data.frame high level API take extra time. low level API HTTP request, gives back JSON without parsing. low level functions underscore end function name, e.g., rl_search_()

title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: package include support spatial API, described https://apiv3.iucnredlist.org/spatial

title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: Get proper citation version Red List using programatically running rl_citation()

what: Red List API Terms of Use
title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: See https://www.iucnredlist.org/terms/terms--use

title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: IUCN folks: many frequent calls, many calls per day might get access blocked temporarily. heavy API user, Red List Unit asked contact , might better options. suggest 2-second delay calls plan make lot calls.

what: Citing the IUCN Red List API
title: rredlist — rredlist-package
text: See https://apiv3.iucnredlist.org/

title: rredlist 0.4.0
text: Gains new functions rl_growth_forms() rl_growth_forms_(). added tests well (#20) thanks @stevenpbachman

title: rredlist 0.4.0
text: Now using markdown documentation (#22) Fixed many man files region parameter described requiring taxonomic name - fixed describe accurately. Also improved docs general (#21) Added options category parameter rl_sp_category() function Added docs rl_sp_country get acceptable country codes pass country parameter Added package level manual file ?rredlist-package note IUCN Redlist API documentation suggest using taxonomic names instead IDs IDs can change time

title: rredlist 0.3.0
text: CRAN release: 2017-01-11

title: rredlist 0.3.0
text: New functions rl_occ_country rl_occ_country_ getting country occurrences species name ID (#13) Replaced httr crul. Please note affects use curl options. See crul docs use curl options (#14)

title: rredlist 0.3.0
text: User agent string like r-curl/2.3 crul/0.2.0 rOpenSci(rredlist/0.3.0) sent requests now help IUCN API maintainers know often requests come R package (#19) Taxon names now given back rl_threats - didn’t anything package - API now gives names back adds column (#10) Type checking parameter inputs now terms class length - helpful error messages fail (#17) Simplify package codebase single internal function suite half dozen functions similar pattern (#18) Removed key parameter rl_version() rl_citation() API key required methods thorough test suite
